_how_to_edit: Your public track record. Add a call when you make it, resolve it when the outcome is known. Honesty is the whole point — log the misses too. Fields: date (YYYY-MM-DD made), subject, claim (what you predicted), reasoning (why), conviction (Low/Medium/High), resolve_by (YYYY-MM-DD), status (open/correct/wrong/partial), resolution + resolved_date (fill on resolution). Save = site auto-redeploys.

predictions.subject: Bending Spoons (Nasdaq: BSP)
predictions.claim: The IPO prices near the simulator's comps output of ~$19B, not the lower end of the marketed $26-28 range.
predictions.reasoning: Running the disclosed run-rate revenue through an 8x ARR comp lands at $19.2B. Profitable + doubling EBITDA guidance means the book should clear above range.
predictions.resolution: Priced at $29/share ($18.4B), above the $26-28 range; closed day one near $25B. Comps call was within ~4%.

predictions.subject: AI-agent payment infrastructure
predictions.claim: The agent-payments category (Natural and peers) sees at least one $1B+ round or acquisition before mid-2027.
predictions.reasoning: Agent commerce is a clear where-the-puck-is-going bet; incumbents (Stripe, Visa) are already responding. Capital tends to concentrate fast once a category is validated.

predictions.subject: 2021-vintage late-stage unicorns
predictions.claim: At least one visible 2021-vintage unicorn posts a down round, structured raise, or shutdown each quarter through end-2026.
predictions.reasoning: Late-stage repricing from the 2021 peak is still working through the system; runway raised at zero-rate valuations is expiring.
